answer:
To find the tens digit of $13^{2023}$, we can use the fact that the last two digits of $13^n$ repeat in a cycle of length 20.

The last two digits of $13^1$ are 13, $13^2$ are 69, $13^3$ are 61, $13^4$ are 33, $13^5$ are 49, $13^6$ are 37, $13^7$ are 61, $13^8$ are 89, $13^9$ are 17, $13^{10}$ are 21, $13^{11}$ are 73, $13^{12}$ are 49, $13^{13}$ are 37, $13^{14}$ are 61, $13^{15}$ are 89, $13^{16}$ are 17, $13^{17}$ are 21, $13^{18}$ are 73, $13^{19}$ are 49, $13^{20}$ are 37.

We can see that the last two digits of $13^n$ repeat in a cycle of length 20. Therefore, we can reduce the exponent 2023 modulo 20 to find the last two digits of $13^{2023}$.

2023 mod 20 = 3

So, the last two digits of $13^{2023}$ are the same as the last two digits of $13^3$, which are 61.

The tens digit of $13^{2023}$ is 6.

\boxed{6}
